evals.prompt: I need to find verified emails for 300 prospects. How do I do this in Mailmo and what will it cost?
evals.expected_output: Guidance on using Mailmo's Email Finder, credit cost estimation, plan recommendation, and export workflow.

assertions.name: credit_model
assertions.description: Response must explain that Mailmo only charges for verified emails found — no charge for misses or duplicates

assertions.name: plan_recommendation
assertions.description: Response must recommend an appropriate plan based on 300 prospects (Starter at 500 credits or Professional at 2,500)

assertions.name: export_workflow
assertions.description: Response must mention CSV export as the way to get found emails into other tools, since Mailmo has no native CRM integrations

evals.prompt: I have a list of 800 emails that need verification before my outbound campaign. Many are on catch-all domains. Can Mailmo help?
evals.expected_output: Guidance on bulk verification with emphasis on Mailmo's catch-all detection advantage.

assertions.name: catch_all_advantage
assertions.description: Response must highlight Mailmo's catch-all verification as a key differentiator — standard verifiers mark catch-all as risky, Mailmo verifies the specific mailbox

assertions.name: bulk_workflow
assertions.description: Response must walk through uploading a CSV for bulk verification

assertions.name: not_a_sending_tool
assertions.description: Response must clarify that Mailmo verifies emails but does not send them — user needs a separate outbound tool for the actual campaign

evals.prompt: Does Mailmo have an API I can use to automate email finding?
evals.expected_output: Honest answer that no public API has been found, with alternatives that do offer APIs.

assertions.name: no_api
assertions.description: Response must clearly state that Mailmo does not appear to have a public API — operations are through the web UI and Chrome extension only

assertions.name: alternatives
assertions.description: Response must suggest alternative email finder tools that do offer APIs (e.g., Hunter.io, Tomba, Prospeo)

assertions.name: workaround
assertions.description: Response must mention the CSV export as the current workaround for getting data out of Mailmo
